alchemist (n.) 炼金术士
【词性变化】alchemy (n.) 炼金术
【搭配词】the alchemist, an old alchemist
 The alchemist picked up a book that someone in the caravan had brought.

contemplate (v.) 凝视、沉思
【词性变化】contemplation (n.) 沉思
【搭配词】contemplate one's beauty, contemplate the future
 The alchemist knew the legend of Narcissus, a youth who knelt daily beside a lake to contemplate his own beauty.

fascinated (adj.) 着迷的、被深深吸引的
【词性变化】fascinate (v.) 使着迷; fascination (n.) 魅力
【搭配词】be fascinated by, fascinated with
 He was so fascinated by himself that, one morning, he fell into the lake and drowned.

recurrent (adj.) 复发的、反复出现的
【词性变化】recur (v.) 复发; recurrence (n.) 重现
【搭配词】recurrent dream, recurrent problem
 He thought for a moment that it would be better to pay her fee and leave without learning a thing, that he was giving too much importance to his recurrent dream.

interpretation (n.) 解释、说明
【词性变化】interpret (v.) 解释; interpreter (n.) 译员
【搭配词】dream interpretation, give an interpretation
 And this is my interpretation: you must go to the Pyramids in Egypt.

destiny (n.) 命运、定数
【词性变化】destined (adj.) 注定的
【搭配词】fulfill one's destiny, meet one's destiny
 It will most certainly touch the very core of every heart earnestly seeking its own destiny on the journey of life.

inexhaustible (adj.) 用不完的、无穷无尽的
【词性变化】exhaust (v.) 耗尽; exhaustion (n.) 疲惫
【搭配词】inexhaustible supply, huge and inexhaustible
 The world was huge and inexhaustible; he had only to allow his sheep to set the route for a while.

mysterious (adj.) 神秘的、不可思议的
【词性变化】mystery (n.) 谜; mysteriously (adv.) 神秘地
【搭配词】mysterious energy, mysterious force
 It was as if some mysterious energy bound his life to that of the sheep.

conspire (v.) 密谋、协力促成
【词性变化】conspiracy (n.) 阴谋
【搭配词】conspire to help, conspire against
 When you want something, the whole universe conspires to help you.

metaphor (n.) 隐喻、暗喻
【词性变化】metaphorical (adj.) 隐喻的
【搭配词】living metaphor, use a metaphor
 I was living my own metaphor. A man sets out on a journey, dreaming of a beautiful or magical place.

resonate (v.) 共鸣、产生深远影响
【词性变化】resonance (n.) 共鸣
【搭配词】resonate with people, resonate deeply
 The Alchemist continues all these years later to resonate with people from different cultures all around the world.

reconciliation (n.) 和解、调停
【词性变化】reconcile (v.) 和解
【搭配词】chance for reconciliation, bring about reconciliation
 There is always a chance for reconciliation, a chance that one day he and I will sit around a table together.
